_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: we inferred A/B group-level compartments in CNF and PNFs at 100 kb resolution. We show that the 3D genomic organization between CNFs and PNFs is 80–85% concordant whereas 15–20% of the compartments are inverted or discordant
details: Successfully inferred A/B group-level compartments in CNF and PNFs at 100 kb resolution, showing 80-85% concordance with 15-20% discordant compartments between tumor types
